text:
Kaworu's Coffins are a set of coffins present on the Moon from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. 

History

Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone

They first appear in Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone, after the Sixth Angel was defeated when Kaworu appears and chats with one of the SEELE members.

Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time

In Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time, it is revealed that Kaworu is trapped in an endless cycle and is reborn after each death while keeping his memories of his previous lives in one of Evangelions different series. During the Human Instrumentality, he is shown coming out of one of the coffins and looking at all the others.
